blocks.content: The week after the last Thursday felt different. Like something had been set in motion and I was waiting to find out what it was.
She texted Saturday morning. I'd been staring at her number since Friday night trying to decide if I was going to text first.
She knew about the game. She'd been paying attention.
we won. I didn't play but I was on the sideline
She was there. She came to the game and didn't say anything about it and then texted me after. I read it three times.
Monday. English class. Same seat. The week started the same way it always did — the only difference was my phone.
Monday. English class. Same seat. The week started the same way it always did.
Monday. English class. Same seat. The week started the same way it always did.
